title: 2026-05-22 / 兼不可得
content:
Kagi 推出了一个叫 Small Web 的东西，curate 英文独立博客，同时还提供收费 API：

Obtain real-time updates from Kagi Small Web through our RSS feed (https://kagi.com/api/v1/smallweb/feed/), refreshed every 5 hours.

For API enthusiasts, Kagi Small Web is integrated into our TinyGem index (https://help.kagi.com/kagi/api/enrich.html), offering high-quality, non-mainstream news from around the web at $2 per 1000 queries.

为什么丑搜又没有米又被骂？
